message:
feat(storage): add workflow action plans table and enrich step logs

Extend the SQLite storage schema (v6→v7) to support workflow
explainability and better debugging:

New workflow_action_plans table:
- Stores canonical JSON representation of action plans
- Content-addressed via plan_hash for deduplication
- Links to workflow_executions for audit trail

Enhanced workflow_step_logs:
- Add step_id and step_kind for precise identification
- Add policy_summary JSON for decision rationale
- Add verification_refs JSON for evidence tracking
- Add error_code for stable error classification

The migration adds the new table and indices while preserving
existing data. Schema version bumped to 7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
